# PetPalHQ

> Editorial synthesis of expert consensus for dog, cat, aquarium, reptile, and bird owners. We don't run a testing lab. We cite veterinary references, regulatory guidance, peer-reviewed studies, and manufacturer documentation by name, and date every refresh.

PetPalHQ groups its content into editorial hubs and buying guides. Hubs synthesize the expert consensus on a topic; buying guides apply that consensus to specific products with the PetPal Gear Score (a transparent, weighted composite of expert opinion). Every claim is attributed to a named source. Every guide carries an updatedDate (editorial freshness) and lastProductCheck (pricing freshness).

Source stack: Merck Veterinary Manual, AAHA, AVMA, AAFP, ISFM, Cornell Feline Health Center, Tufts Cummings Petfoodology, FDA Center for Veterinary Medicine, EPA, CDC Healthy Pets/Healthy People, AAFCO, FAA/TSA, Center for Pet Safety, AVSAB, USDA APHIS, Lafeber Vet, ASPCA Animal Poison Control, peer-reviewed journals, manufacturer technical pages, and named hobbyist communities (signal, never authority).

Cross-domain: PetPalHQ shares editorial direction with the established sister site SmartHomeExplorer (smarthomeexplorer.com); both run the same synthesis discipline applied to different verticals.

Contact: editor@petpalhq.com

## AI Agent API (Model Context Protocol)

Live MCP server for AI agents: query ranked pet-gear picks, product verdicts, comparisons, and buying-guide matches directly. Responses carry PetPal Gear Scores with PetPalHQ citation URLs.

- MCP endpoint (streamable HTTP): https://petpalhq.com/api/mcp
- Discovery manifest: https://petpalhq.com/.well-known/mcp
- Documentation: https://petpalhq.com/tools/mcp

Tools: search_pet_products, get_pet_product_verdict, compare_pet_products, get_pet_buying_guide.

## Editorial hubs

Cluster guides that synthesize expert consensus on a topic. Each hub links to the buying guides for that vertical.

- [Aquarium Water Quality, Cycling & Testing](https://petpalhq.com/guides/aquarium-water-quality-cycling-testing-beginners): What to test, what the numbers mean, how cycling works, and what to do before bad water quality hurts your fish.
- [Aquarium Filtration & Maintenance](https://petpalhq.com/guides/aquarium-filtration-maintenance-systems): How filtration really works, how to size it for your tank, and the maintenance routine that keeps water safe — not just clear.
- [Reptile Habitat & Environmental Control](https://petpalhq.com/guides/reptile-habitat-environmental-control): How to design heat gradients, humidity zones, and safe enclosure controls for bearded dragons, geckos, snakes, and tortoises — synthesized from veterinary and university…
- [Reptile UVB Lighting & Basking](https://petpalhq.com/guides/reptile-uvb-lighting-basking): How UVB, UVA, visible light, and basking heat actually work — and how to choose between T5, compact, mercury vapor, and basking bulbs for your reptile.
- [Smart Bird Feeders & Backyard Birdwatching](https://petpalhq.com/guides/smart-bird-feeders-backyard-birdwatching): What a smart bird feeder actually is, how camera-and-AI feeders compare to standard feeders, and how to set up a safer, cleaner backyard birdwatching station.
- [Cat & Dog Nutrition, Hydration & Digestive Health](https://petpalhq.com/guides/cat-dog-nutrition-hydration-digestive-health): How to choose complete and balanced food, support hydration, avoid common digestive mistakes, and know when GI signs need a vet.
- [Cat & Dog Grooming, Dental & Shedding](https://petpalhq.com/guides/cat-dog-grooming-dental-shedding): A safe routine for cats and dogs combines coat brushing, nail maintenance, skin and ear checks, dental prevention, and species-appropriate shedding control — with veterinary care…
- [Cat & Dog Behavior, Anxiety & Enrichment](https://petpalhq.com/guides/cat-dog-behavior-anxiety-enrichment): How to tell normal species behavior from stress and anxiety, build real enrichment for cats and dogs, and know when behavior change needs a veterinarian.
- [Pet Home Systems, Cleanup & Travel](https://petpalhq.com/guides/pet-home-systems-cleanup-travel): What the spec sheet does not tell you about litter boxes, carriers, crash-tested restraints, pet cameras, microchip feeders, and travel rules — distilled from federal,…
- [Senior Pet Mobility & Preventive Care](https://petpalhq.com/guides/senior-pet-mobility-preventive-care): How to recognize pain, schedule screening, protect mobility, and modify the home for aging dogs and cats — synthesized from AAHA, Merck, Cornell, and Tufts.

## Aquarium buying guides

### Aquarium Water Quality, Cycling & Testing

- [Best Aquarium Bacteria Starters for New Freshwater Tanks (2026)](https://petpalhq.com/guides/best-aquarium-bacteria-starter-2026): DrTim's One and Only and FritzZyme 7 Freshwater are the science-forward picks for a fishless cycle; Tetra SafeStart Plus and API Quick Start are the mass-market options. None of…
- [Best Aquarium Water Conditioner for Freshwater Tanks (2026)](https://petpalhq.com/guides/best-aquarium-water-conditioner-2026): Seachem Prime is the default routine conditioner for most freshwater tanks. Add API Stress Coat for new arrivals or quarantine, Fritz Complete for emergency-grade ammonia…
- [Best Aquarium Water Test Kits for Freshwater Fish Tanks (2026)](https://petpalhq.com/guides/best-aquarium-water-test-kits-2026): For most freshwater keepers, an API Freshwater Master Test Kit handles ammonia, nitrite, nitrate, and pH; add an API GH and KH kit if you keep shrimp or livebearers, and skip…

### Aquarium Filtration & Maintenance

The Tetra Whisper 40/60 is the mainstream value pick, the Tetra AP300 pushes air to deep tanks,…
- [Best Aquarium Canister Filters (2026)](https://petpalhq.com/guides/best-aquarium-canister-filters-2026): The OASE BioMaster Thermo 350 is the canister we'd buy first for a planted or community tank up to ~90 gallons, thanks to its lift-out pre-filter and built-in heater. The Fluval…
- [Best Aquarium Chillers for Reef & Marine Tanks (2026)](https://petpalhq.com/guides/best-aquarium-chillers-2026): The JBJ Arctica 1/10 HP is the titanium chiller we'd start with on a 75-to-130-gallon reef, thanks to a corrosion-proof titanium coil and a built-in thermostat rated within ±1°F.…
- [Best Aquarium Cleaning Tools for Better Water Quality (2026)](https://petpalhq.com/guides/best-aquarium-cleaning-tools-2026): Aqueon's gravel vacuums and the Python No Spill Clean and Fill solve the two biggest reasons hobbyists skip water changes. Flipper and Mag-Float magnetic cleaners handle algae…
- [Best Aquarium Filters and Filter Media for Clear, Healthy Water (2026)](https://petpalhq.com/guides/best-aquarium-filters-and-media-2026): AquaClear and Tidal HOBs handle most beginner-to-mid community tanks. Fluval's 307 and 407 canisters take over at 55 to 100 gallons. The hygger Double Sponge wins for shrimp,…
- [Best Aquarium Hang-on-Back (HOB) Filters (2026)](https://petpalhq.com/guides/best-aquarium-hang-on-back-filters-2026): The Seachem Tidal 55 is the HOB we'd buy first for a mid-size community tank, thanks to its self-priming pump, surface skimmer, and open media basket. The AquaClear 110 scales…
- [Best Aquarium Return Pumps for Reef Sumps (2026)](https://petpalhq.com/guides/best-aquarium-return-pumps-2026): The Reef Octopus VarioS-4 is the controllable DC return pump we'd build a serious reef sump around, with a 0-10V port for Apex and a 14.7 ft max head. The AC Sicce Syncra Silent…
- [Best Aquarium Sponge Filters for Shrimp, Fry, Betta & Quarantine (2026)](https://petpalhq.com/guides/best-aquarium-sponge-filters-2026): Air-driven sponge filters are the safest, cheapest biological filtration for shrimp, fry, betta, and hospital tanks. The hygger Double Sponge wins for most 10-40 gallon setups.…
- [Best Aquarium UV Sterilizers (2026)](https://petpalhq.com/guides/best-aquarium-uv-sterilizers-2026): The Coralife Turbo-Twist 6X is the UV sterilizer we'd start with for most mid-size tanks: a 18-watt twist-flow canister Coralife rates for up to 250 gallons that removes…
- [Best Automatic Top-Off (ATO) Systems for Reef Tanks (2026)](https://petpalhq.com/guides/best-automatic-aquarium-ato-systems-2026): The Tunze Osmolator 3 is the ATO we'd buy first for most reef tanks, pairing a 0.5mm optical sensor with an independent safety sensor for redundant overflow protection. The…
- [Best Protein Skimmers for Saltwater & Reef Tanks (2026)](https://petpalhq.com/guides/best-protein-skimmers-saltwater-reef-2026): The Reef Octopus Classic 110-INT is the in-sump needle-wheel skimmer we'd start with on a 100-130 gallon reef, thanks to a proven Aquatrance pinwheel pump and a forgiving foam…
- [Best Reef Aquarium LED Lighting (2026): Kessil A360XE, AI Hydra 32 HD & Red Sea ReefLED G2](https://petpalhq.com/guides/best-reef-aquarium-led-lighting-2026): The reef LEDs that actually grow coral in 2026 — the high-PAR Kessil pendant, the seven-channel AI Hydra for big SPS tanks, the all-in-one Red Sea ReefLED G2, and honest nano and…

## Supporting pages

- [Methodology](https://petpalhq.com/methodology): Source stack, PetPal Gear Score formula (v1.0), refresh policy, and a live data-refresh table for the most-recently-updated guides on the site.
- [PetPal Gear Score methodologies](https://petpalhq.com/scores): Aggregator of all PetPal Gear Score formulas across the site, grouped by vertical.
- [About PetPalHQ](https://petpalhq.com/about): Editorial voice, what we cover, why we exist, and how we synthesize expert consensus instead of running a testing lab.
- [Author — Nick Miles](https://petpalhq.com/author/nick-miles): Editor of PetPalHQ and SmartHomeExplorer. Person schema with sameAs cross-domain links.
- [Affiliate disclosure](https://petpalhq.com/affiliate-disclosure): Amazon Associates Program participation, FTC compliance, and the full policy on commissions versus editorial recommendations. Tag: petpalhq08-20.
- [Privacy policy](https://petpalhq.com/privacy-policy): What we collect, how we use it, third-party processors (Google Analytics, Brevo, ImprovMX, Vercel, Amazon), and CCPA + GDPR rights.
- [Guides index](https://petpalhq.com/guides): Browse all editorial hubs and buying guides.
- [PetPal Playground](https://petpalhq.com/playground): Novelty picks, costume guides, and pop-culture pet finds — editorially distinct from the vet-cited buying guides.
- [Active deals](https://petpalhq.com/deals): Site-wide aggregator of currently-active manufacturer and Amazon promotions across all featured picks. Auto-hides expired codes; verified weekly.
